title: E-Commerce Exporters Ke Liye NIRYAT PROTSAHAN Ke Under Nayi Credit Assistance Scheme Launch!
content:
# E-Commerce Exporters Ke Liye NIRYAT PROTSAHAN Ke Under Nayi Credit Assistance Scheme Launch!

Ek important update hai! Government ne **e-commerce exporters ko support karne ke liye ek nayi Credit Assistance Scheme** announce ki hai, NIRYAT PROTSAHAN Export Promotion Mission ke under. Isse MSME exporters ko working capital access mein kaafi madad milegi.

*   **Kya Hai Ye Scheme?** Yeh scheme Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) ko cross-border e-commerce exports mein working capital provide karne ke liye design ki gayi hai.
*   **Why This Scheme?** Iska main aim hai MSMEs ke liye credit access behtar karna, jisse woh global digital trade value chains mein apni participation badha sakein.
*   **Key Features:**
    *   Banks ko credit guarantee cover milega for working capital assistance.
    *   Interest subvention support bhi provide kiya jayega.
    *   **Direct E-Commerce Credit Facility:** Ismein ₹50 lakh tak ki credit limit, 90% tak guarantee cover ke saath.
    *   **Overseas Inventory E-Commerce Credit Facility:** Ismein ₹5 crore tak ki credit limit, 75% tak guarantee cover ke saath.
    *   Eligible financing par 2.75% ka interest subvention milega, with an annual cap of ₹15 lakh per beneficiary MSME.
*   **Operational Details:** Scheme ko pilot basis par Export-Import Bank of India (Exim Bank) ke through operationalize kiya ja raha hai. Exporters ko DGFT portal par online application submit karke Unique Identification Number (UIN) lena hoga.
*   **Notification Reference:** Yeh initiative Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT), Ministry of Commerce & Industry ne Trade Notice No. 31/2025-26 dated March 6, 2026, ke through notify kiya hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://dgft.gov.in/CP/?opt=trade-notices)

*Published on: 7 March 2026*
